channel.title: Scikit-learn on Caio Mescouto
channel.description: Recent content in Scikit-learn on Caio Mescouto

item.title: How to use Scikit-learn Pipeline to train different models at once
item.description: How to use Scikit-learn Pipeline to train different models at once I spent some time understanding how to properly use Pipeline in Scikit-Learn but the most examples I bumped into and the path I followed was focused on using it to wrap up some data pre-processing and feature engineering. Even though it is handy, I always had been stuck in the process of short-listing promising models - I strongly recommend that you check out the ml project checklist proposed by Aurélien Géron -, having to run each model in different tries.
